articles.title: Vitalik Buterin’s 2025 Vision for Ethereum
articles.description: Focused on two major themes—advancing Ethereum’s infrastructure and promoting broader decentralized ecosystems. Buterin’s roadmap outlines ambitious steps. His vision is not just about improving Ethereum but also about fostering a decentralized future that goes beyond currency and trading. Strengthening Ethereum’s Core Infrastructure Buterin’s priority for 2025 revolves around Ethereum’s core infrastructure
